title: SAP Business ByDesign Finance Essentials
description: A comprehensive guide to financial accounting, controlling, and reporting in SAP Business ByDesign. Covers journal entries, cost centres, financial close, and real-time analytics for finance teams in mid-market organisations.

title: Procurement Excellence with SAP ByDesign
description: Master end-to-end procurement in SAP ByD – from purchase requests and supplier management to invoice verification and spend analytics. Includes practical configuration tips and best-practice process flows.

title: SAP ByDesign CRM for Sales Teams
description: A hands-on playbook for sales managers and CRM administrators. Covers opportunity management, sales planning, activity tracking, and customer analytics within SAP Business ByDesign.

title: HR Management in SAP Business ByDesign
description: Everything HR professionals need to manage employee data, time recording, absence management, and organisational structures in SAP ByD. Written for both first-time users and experienced HR consultants.

title: SAP ByDesign Integration Patterns
description: Deep-dive into integration architecture for SAP Business ByDesign. Covers OData APIs, SOAP web services, SAP Integration Suite connectivity, and field-proven patterns for connecting ByD to external systems.

title: Manufacturing and Supply Chain in SAP ByDesign
description: A practical reference for production planners and supply-chain managers using SAP Business ByDesign. Topics include production orders, MRP, inventory valuation, logistics, and demand planning.

title: SAP Business ByDesign for SME Leaders
description: A strategic guide for CEOs, CFOs, and IT managers evaluating or rolling out SAP Business ByDesign. Explains key capabilities, implementation approach, and how to drive adoption across departments.

title: Analytics and Reporting in SAP ByDesign
description: Unlock the full reporting power of SAP Business ByDesign. Covers embedded analytics, custom reports, KPI dashboards, data export to Excel, and connecting ByD data to SAP Analytics Cloud.
